description: A Class B artifact omitting the required sources field MUST receive INVALID status. Evidence sources must be explicitly declared (B1).

input.claim: this execution occurred with the declared observed result

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariant B1: a Class B artifact MUST declare all evidence sources explicitly. The artifact above references src-runtime-log in timestamps and observations but omits the sources field entirely — there is no declared registry of evidence sources. A conformant verifier MUST reject the artifact as INVALID. Without B1, evidence is untraceable; the artifact fails before its observation content can be evaluated for SUPPORTED/CONFLICTED/INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE. This vector closes the only Class B status (INVALID) not previously reached by the conformance set.
